title: Kozani, Western Macedonia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Kozani is a city in Western Macedonia with a population of 70,220. Western Macedonia’s capital known for its saffron production, archaeological museum, and winter festivals.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
